content: ALB idle timeout default 60s, configurable 1–4000s (load balancer attribute). WebRTC media (UDP) bypasses the ALB entirely when tasks have public IPs — ALB only carries HTTPS signaling. A single POST /api/offer completes in <60s so default is fine; raise it only if signaling uses long-lived WebSocket/SSE. Also relevant: target group deregistration delay affects deploys, not established UDP flows (UDP media survives ALB draining since it never touches the ALB, but task stop kills it).
